description_long: This is a brown glass bottle with a long neck and a narrow mouth, featuring a prominent Asahi label on the front. The main label is white with black and red text, and there is a smaller neck label with similar color themes. The bottle has a metallic-looking cap, likely made of aluminum, and the body is smooth and cylindrical, tapering slightly toward the top. The rear of the bottle is mostly plain brown glass, with a secondary label visible on the back. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible damage or deformation, and the branding is clear and professionally printed.
description: A brown glass bottle with Asahi branding, white and red labels, and a metallic cap. The bottle is smooth, cylindrical, and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Asahi label, neck label, and metallic cap.
description_view_1: Angled rear view revealing the edge of the main label and a partial back label.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain brown glass with minimal label visibility.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the back label and part of the main label.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a large white label with the Asahi logo in black, red Japanese text, and additional branding elements in black and red. There is also a smaller neck label with similar color themes. The labels are printed in a clean, modern style.
